texto: From shaping CRM to understanding today’s omni-channel digital customer, Barton Goldenberg leads the way again with his compelling insights and methodologies. The timing of his latest book, The Definitive Guide to Social CRM, once again demonstrates his forward thinking.
explicacao: Citação de Bob Dunfee sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “From shaping CRM to understanding today’s omni-channel digital customer, Barton Goldenberg leads …” articula reflexao, social-crm, social-media em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como social-media.
